docs.title: ITS Agent Pattern
docs.text:
This ontology defines concepts related to ITS agents.

This pattern imports the following files:

  • https://w3id.org/citydata/part1/v1/Agent.owl

This pattern consists of the following classes:

  • Agent
  • ITS Agent Thing
  • Role

The formal definition of this pattern is available in OWL Syntax.

docs.title: Diagram
docs.text:
SVG (interactive)PNG

cluster_associated Agent Agent Role Role Agent->Role playsRole «only»   cdm1_Agent cdm1:Agent Agent->cdm1_Agent ITSAgentThing ITSAgentThing Agent->ITSAgentThing

docs.title: Formalization for Agent
docs.text: Property Constraint playsRole only Role subClassOf ITSAgentThing subClassOf cdm1:Agent

docs.title: ITS Agent Pattern
docs.text:
This ontology defines concepts related to ITS agents.

This pattern imports the following files:

  • https://w3id.org/citydata/part1/v1/Agent.owl

This pattern consists of the following classes:

  • Agent
  • ITS Agent Thing
  • Role

The formal definition of this pattern is available in OWL Syntax.

docs.title: Diagram
docs.text:
SVG (interactive)PNG

cluster_associated ITSAgentThing ITSAgentThing its-core_ITSThing its-core:ITSThing ITSAgentThing->its-core_ITSThing

docs.title: Diagram
docs.text:
SVG (interactive)PNG

cluster_associated Role Role ITSAgentThing ITSAgentThing Role->ITSAgentThing

docs.title: Formalization for Role
docs.text: Property Constraint cdm1:hasName exactly 1 subClassOf ITSAgentThing
